title: VanillaPvP+
description: VanillaPvP+ is a slight visual enhancement to Vanilla Minecraft's textures while also being fitted with PvP improvements.
body:
# Vanilla PvP+
Vanilla PvP+ aims to slightly enhance the looks of Vanilla Minecraft while also being a Resource Pack fitted for PvP combat.  

**This resource pack includes optional OptiFine features for added features.**  

[Alternative Download [PlanetMinecraft]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vanilla-pvp-6642270/)
Report issues here!

## Features
- ⛏️ **Block Destruction Progress Indicator**
- 🏹 **Bow Charge Indicator**
- 🔥 **Lowered Fire Texture**
- 💎 **Emissive Ores + Borders**
- ⚔️ **Shorter Tools and Weapons**
- 💥 **Unobtrusive Particles**
- 🎃 **Unobtrusive Pumpkin HUD**
- 👁️ **Visual Clarity to Certain Blocks, Armor and Items**  
❗ **Some of these features require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)**

## Front Page Showcase
![Armor Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1ee801af404f5e43d59e72284de7cb1d4a0c217.png)
![Weaponry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce301bb6c823c3300d816c092348ec1069e6863.png)
![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c6be70b497aaf109402a952aab064521207dca5.png)
More images are available in the **Gallery** section.
